name: Cockles with Fermented Chili Dressing
steps: Steam the cockles and open them, removing one of the shells.
Arrange the cockles in a claypot and cover with a wet cloth until ready to serve.
If there is leftover cockles liquid, leave some at the bottom of the claypot.
At serving time, drape the cockles with the sauce, put a lid on, and steam until hot.
Add picked chervil and crispy chicken skin, put the lid back on, and serve.

other_details.notes: Ideally the presentation, half shell cockles all face up around in a circle, with a drape of sauce on top, picked chervil and chicken skin.
